Document:
# Server Rules The following rules are for the Far Horizons Space Station 14 server. Violating these rules may result in a warning, a temporary ban, or a permanent ban. You may also be banned from specific roles/jobs/departments. Bans can be appealed in the official Far Horizons Discord server.
Players are also expected to understand Metashield.
If you are ever in doubt as to whether or not something is breaking the rules, feel free to contact the admins via Admin Help or ask on the Discord server.
For in-universe laws and rules check Space Law and SOP.
Remember, the rules and examples given here are NOT exhaustive. (See Rule 1)
The server is strictly +16 only, unless stated otherwise in the server description that it is +18.
## Core Rules These rules apply at all times, including between rounds.
- [textlink="0. Be Respectful" link="RuleFH0"] - [textlink="1. Respect Admin Decisions" link="RuleFH1"] - [textlink="2. No Griefing, Bug Abuse, or Exploits" link="RuleFH2"] - [textlink="3. Abide by Medium Roleplay (MRP) Standards" link="RuleFH3"] - [textlink="4. Escalation of Force Must Make Sense" link="RuleFH4"] - [textlink="5. Antagonists Must Follow MRP Logic" link="RuleFH5"] - [textlink="6. Your Character Must Make Sense" link="RuleFH6"] - [textlink="7. Self-Antagonism" link="RuleFH7"] - [textlink="8. No Validhunting" link="RuleFH8"] - [textlink="9. Interacting with SSD/AFK Players" link="RuleFH9"] - [textlink="10. Erotic and Sexual Content is Forbidden" link="RuleFH10"] - [textlink="11. New Life" link="RuleFH11"] - [textlink="12. Silicons and Thaven Rules" link="RuleFH12"] - [textlink="13. Command, Security, and Whitelist Expectations" link="RuleFH13"] - [textlink="14. Continuity Guidelines" link="RuleFH14"]
## Supporting documents These documents are related to the rules in some way. - [textlink="Metashield" link="Metashield"]
